samples.title: Spaghetti and Meatballs
steps: Melt butter in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish
Combine spinach, sauce, bread crumbs, cheese, Parmesan cheese and parsley
samples.formatted:
Spaghetti and Meatballs

Ingredients:
- butter
- fresh spinach
- marinara sauce
- Italian seasoned breadcrumbs
- parmesan cheese
- mozzarella cheese
- parsley

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees
2. Melt butter in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish
3. Combine spinach, sauce, bread crumbs, cheese, Parmesan cheese and parsley
4. Pour over butter
5. Sprinkle with mozzarella
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes. <

samples.title: Spaghetti and Meatballs
steps: Mix potatoes, onion, beaten egg, flour, salt and pepper together
Heat oil, then pour into large skillet
Turn mixture over and cook until brown
Fill heavy skillet with enough water to cover
samples.formatted:
Spaghetti and Meatballs

Ingredients:
- potatoes
- onion
- egg
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- cooking oil

Instructions:
1. Mix potatoes, onion, beaten egg, flour, salt and pepper together
2. Heat oil, then pour into large skillet
3. Turn mixture over and cook until brown
4. Turn out on paper towel
5. Drain on paper towel
6. Cover with a paper towel
7. Fill heavy skillet with enough water to cover

samples.title: Spaghetti and Meatballs
steps: Place all ingredients in a large bowl, except raisins, raisins, and sugar
Pour into greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan
samples.formatted:
Spaghetti and Meatballs

Ingredients:
- flour
- baking powder
- soda
- cinnamon
- salt
- nutmeg
- eggs
- oil
- vanilla
- raisins
- sugar

Instructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large bowl, except raisins, raisins, and sugar
2. Mix thoroughly
3. Stir in raisins
4. Bake at 350 for 1 hour
5. Pour into greased 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan
